jobDescription: This is Adyen Speed is the foundation of our company. We think fast. We work fast. We launch fast. We put our merchants at the center of everything we do, and we never stop until the job is done. We’re creating our own path, with a global team driving sustainable growth. We don’t do hierarchy, egos or boundaries. “ Not possible” is not in our vocabulary — “freedom” is. This is who we are: honest, direct and always bringing an element of fun into our work. If you’re ready to join the power of fast, keep reading. Full-stack Developer Adyen is looking for an experienced full-stack developer with ambition who, as a member of our small multidisciplinary website team, will help us bring adyen.com to the next level by pushing the boundaries of our visitor experience and our technology. As a full-stack developer on the team, you will take ownership of the codebase and bring your vision to the way we iterate on it, and grow it. adyen.com is the face of Adyen to the world, and this role is integral to ensuring that people are getting the correct impression of our dynamic and innovative company. What you’ll do You will be a member of our website team, a small multidisciplinary group of (front-end) developers, designers, copy writers, and marketers. You will take ownership of the website codebase (back-end & front-end), have the freedom to create and adapt the content management system ( CMS) to make it more user-friendly, robust and scalable, as well as pushing the envelope always improving the end user’s website experience. You will collaborate with marketers to create user experience experiments to help guide our decision-making process with analytics. You will be responsible for full life cycle development including communicating with stakeholders and users throughout the development process. You will coordinate with our documentation team to keep a consistent feeling across adyen.com and docs.adyen.com. Who you are You have at least 5 years of experience with building things in Magnolia CMS or any other Java based CMS. You have at least 5 years of experience with building things in HTML, CSS, Java Script and using a framework ( Vue.js is a plus!). You like to share your knowledge to develop yourself and your team. You are comfortable with asking and receiving constructive feedback from your colleagues regularly. You are a strong team player, you like to communicate in person with your team members and other stakeholders to come to the best solution. You recognize yourself in the Adyen Formula: being open minded, having a proactive attitude, always trying to make it work while keeping the bigger picture in mind. Who we are Adyen is the payments platform of choice for the world's leading companies, delivering frictionless payments across online, mobile and in-store channels. It is the only provider of a modern end-to-end infrastructure, connecting directly to Visa, Mastercard, and consumers' globally preferred payment methods. With offices around the world, Adyen serves nine of the 10 largest U. S. internet companies and many worldwide retailers. Customers include Facebook, Uber, L' Oreal, Casper, Bonobos, and Spotify. We offer a competitive salary, knowledge sharing internal events, exchange program to other offices, help with relocation and great career opportunities. Become part of an international work environment and take your career to the next level!
